div.p: Critical Thread Violation Panic Message: "Structure is locked while systems are executing."

p.em: Command buffering allows 10x higher concurrency during system execution phase.

ul.li: L01: Systems cannot see structural changes made within the same tick.
L02: Direct entity manipulation during tick() results in immediate abort.
L03: The Command Buffer acts as a synchronized MPSC queue.

ol.li: No systems currently hold world locks.

ul.li: User attempts world.spawn() without using Commands
